title: Cobblemon Scroll Cases
description: Adds CS:GO-style roulette cases for Cobblemon, with tiered Iron, Gold, and Diamond boxes, NPC trades, Pokemon rewards, and Cobblemon item drops.
body:
# Cobblemon Scroll Cases

Cobblemon Scroll Cases adds CS:GO-style roulette case opening to Cobblemon. Open Iron, Gold, and Diamond scroll cases to roll for Pokemon and Cobblemon items with animated spinning rewards.

## Features

- CS:GO-style roulette case opening GUI
- Three case tiers: Iron, Gold, and Diamond
- Separate reward pools for each case
- Pokemon rewards with randomized levels
- Cobblemon item rewards such as balls, candies, healing items, and rare items
- Scroll Trader NPC with villager trade GUI
- Rarity tiers:
  - **SSR** - Gold
  - **SR** - Purple
  - **R** - Blue
  - **N** - Normal

## How to Play

1. Install Fabric, Fabric API, and Cobblemon.
2. Add this mod to your `mods` folder.
3. Join your world or server.
4. Spawn the Scroll Trader with:

```mcfunction
/cobblescroll spawntrader


Trade with the NPC:

10 Iron Ingots = Iron Scroll Case
10 Gold Ingots = Gold Scroll Case
10 Diamonds = Diamond Scroll Case
Right-click a scroll case to open it.

Watch the roulette animation and receive your reward.

Case Types
Iron Scroll Case
Best for early gameplay. Contains normal Cobblemon items and common Pokemon, with pseudo-legendary Pokemon as rare SSR rewards.

Gold Scroll Case
A stronger mid-tier case. Rewards better Pokemon, higher levels, and better Cobblemon items than Iron.

Diamond Scroll Case
The rarest case. Contains rare Pokemon, high-level rewards, Master Balls, rare candies, and other valuable Cobblemon items.

Commands
/cobblescroll spawntrader
/cobblescroll givecase iron
/cobblescroll givecase gold
/cobblescroll givecase diamond
/cobblescroll preview iron
/cobblescroll preview gold
/cobblescroll preview diamond
/cobblescroll reload
Showcase Video
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kEbLKdYjCwg

Requirements
Minecraft 1.21.1
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
Cobblemon
